title: Ender Dragon Destroys End Island
description: Ender Dragon now tears apart End island during battle, leaving massive destruction in its wake.
body:
# Block Collision Changes

**The Ender Dragon now sends blocks flying into the air when it collides with them, instead of simply destroying them. It can also break more blocks than before, including obsidian, iron bars, and end stone. As a result, the Ender Dragon can occasionally destroy the obsidian pillars in the End during the fight.**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1556658/description_c5d4357d-ad73-460a-b8cc-8e6af94fad84.png)

# Configuration

**This mod can be configured in-game through the Mods menu or by editing its configuration file. If you're experiencing performance issues, you can lower the debrisSpawnChance. If flying debris is not moving smoothly, try adjusting the debrisUpdateInterval.**

### Configuration Options

- debrisUpdateInterval - Controls how often flying debris created by dragon should visually update (update once per <value> ticks) (in vanilla Minecraft this value is always 20).

- debrisSpawnChance - Adjust chance of debris spawn. Lower values can improve performance.

- dragonTransparentFluids - Whether dragon should fly through water and lava or destroy them.

- destroyWaterloggedBlocks - If true, waterlogged blocks become debris and fly away. Ignored if dragonTransparentFluids is false.

- protectBlocksWithNBT - If true, blocks that contain NBT data will be protected.

- loudDestruction - Amplifies the Ender Dragon's block destruction sounds.

**[More information about configuration can be found here.](https://github.com/alt778/Ender-Dragon-Destroys-End-Island/wiki)**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1556658/description_443d94cc-97c5-49db-9069-8746dd03169a.png)

# Complementary Shaders Compatibility

**If debris created by the Ender Dragon appears white when using Complementary Shaders, disable fog in the shader settings:**

**Shader Pack Settings → Atmosphere → Fog → OFF**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1556658/description_0dc179a4-14e3-4486-9f1c-cdd502c2048e.png)

# Vanilla Bug Fixes

**This mod also fixes a vanilla bug that can cause the Ender Dragon to collide with its own fireball, making it explode in midair.**

**Fireballs can still naturally collide with nearby obsidian towers or with falling block debris created by this mod.**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1556658/description_189bd257-47ac-4bfa-8faf-7047bea63703.png)

# Servers

**For server owners, mod version 1.1.2 is recommended.**

**All mod versions below 2.0.0 should work correctly on servers.**

**This mod is only required on the server side. Players do not need to install it on their client to join.**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1556658/description_b36b04d4-89ae-4a04-81ef-b16f616c5836.png)

# Useful Commands

**To summon the Ender Dragon:**

`/summon minecraft:ender_dragon ~ ~ ~ {DragonPhase:0}`

**To remove the Ender Dragon:**

`/kill @e[type=minecraft:ender_dragon]`


# Video Showcase

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sqb3WqevkC4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
